summary: Persist the studio cookie header + JWT expiry as a matched triple with the JWT; read the browser at most once per JWT lifetime via EnsureFreshSession.
reason: newClient re-read Chrome's cookie store on every run. The browser-derived cookie header had no stored expiration and no verification. Storing {jwt, studio_cookie_header, jwt_expiry} as a matched triple (cleared whenever the JWT changes) lets routine runs reuse the cached pair and only re-pull when the JWT re-mints, on fresh login, or first run post-upgrade. Env-supplied tokens stay on the per-run pull (unmanaged). When the browser pull returns empty, nothing is persisted (retry next run) rather than writing a broken header-empty/exp-set triple.
